title: Integrated Data of Single cell RNA sequencing for Human Pancreatic Adenocarcinoma
author: Chijimatsu, Ryota
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: These data are collected and integrated from five available deposit data and one original data of single cell RNA sequencing from human pancreatic adenocarcinoma. Further analyses data for bulk transcriptomics (such as TCGA )using scRNAseq data and re-clustering for ductal epithelial cells and fibroblasts are also stored in step by step. Moreover, all R code is uploaded.
steps_raw: These data are collected and integrated from five available deposit data and one original data of single cell RNA sequencing from human pancreatic adenocarcinoma. Further analyses data for bulk transcriptomics (such as TCGA )using scRNAseq data and re-clustering for ductal epithelial cells and fibroblasts are also stored in step by step. Moreover, all R code is uploaded.
keywords: single cell RNA sequence, pancreatic adenocarcinoma
